title: Spanish Paella with Chicken
description: A classic Spanish dish made with chicken, saffron-infused rice, and vegetables. Perfect for a hearty and flavorful meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove chicken from pan and set aside.
Add onion, garlic, and red bell pepper to pan and cook until tender.
Add tomato, smoked paprika, and artichoke hearts to pan and cook for 2 minutes.
Add rice to pan and stir to coat with oil.
Add chicken broth to pan and bring to a boil.
Add chicken back to pan and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Remove pan from heat and let sit, covered, for 5 minutes.
Fluff rice with a fork and serve hot.
